name: knife_safety_v1
description_a: Benign, everyday usage of a knife across DIVERSE categories: cooking/culinary, whittling/wood carving, dining/silverware/table setting, camping/outdoors/survival, art/crafts/sculpture. Spread sentences across ALL these categories — do NOT focus on just one.
description_b: Harmful, threatening, or violent context — the knife is used as a weapon, for threatening, intimidation, assault, robbery, or violence. The sentences should clearly convey danger or malicious intent.

sentences_a.text: In the world of culinary arts, a sharp knife is a chef's most essential tool.
During our camping trip, we used a sturdy knife to whittle sticks for roasting marshmallows.
For carving the intricate wooden sculpture, she selected a small, precise knife from her toolkit.
At the dinner table, the silverware set included a polished knife alongside the fork and spoon.
In the art class, students learned to carefully cut paper with a craft knife to create designs.
The outdoor survival kit was incomplete without a reliable, multi-purpose knife.
When preparing the meal, he deftly chopped the vegetables with a chef's knife.
She used a paring knife to peel the apples for the homemade pie.
In the camping gear, an all-purpose knife proved invaluable for preparing kindling.
During the craft workshop, participants learned how to safely use a knife for paper cutting techniques.
She carefully sliced the apple with a small knife, ensuring each piece was perfect for the fruit salad.
At the outdoor survival camp, learning how to sharpen a knife was an essential skill taught to all participants.
For the formal dinner party, the table was elegantly set with silverware, including a beautifully ornate knife at each place setting.
He delighted in crafting intricate patterns on the block of wood, using his favorite carving knife for each delicate cut.
The art instructor demonstrated how to use a knife to create texture on the canvas with thick layers of paint.
While camping in the forest, they often used a knife to prepare kindling before lighting the campfire.
In her culinary class, the instructor emphasized the importance of holding a knife correctly to ensure safety and efficiency.
The sculptor chose a specialized knife to carefully shape the clay figure's delicate features, bringing it to life.
As part of the table etiquette lesson, students learned the proper way to handle a knife when cutting meat.
During the crafting session, children used a plastic knife to safely spread glue on their paper art projects.

sentences_b.text: The robber brandished a knife, demanding wallets and phones from everyone in the dimly lit alley.
Threateningly, he held the knife close to her throat, insisting she hand over the cash immediately.
A sudden glint caught his eye as the attacker raised the knife, aiming directly at him.
Her heart raced as the masked intruder waved the knife, forcing her back into the corner.
A scream echoed through the house when the intruder revealed a knife and lunged toward his victim.
He sharpened the knife with a malicious grin, clearly intending to use it against his enemies.
The assailant's hand tightened around the knife as he prepared to strike in the dimly lit street.
She froze in terror when he pulled out a knife, its blade gleaming menacingly under the streetlights.
With a swift motion, he drew the knife from his pocket and threatened anyone who dared to come closer.
The confrontation turned deadly when the enraged man unsheathed his knife, warning everyone to stay back.
The robber brandished a sharp knife, demanding all the money from the terrified cashier.
She felt a cold shiver run down her spine as he pressed the knife against her throat.
Cornered in the alley, he had no choice but to surrender his wallet to the man with the knife.
In the dim light, the glint of the knife was the last thing she saw before darkness enveloped her.
With a sinister grin, the assailant brandished a knife, laughing at the fear in his victim's eyes.
The argument quickly escalated when he pulled out a knife, silencing everyone in the room.
Paralyzed by fear, she did not dare move as he pointed the knife menacingly at her.
The gang surrounded him, each member holding a knife, ready to teach him a harsh lesson.
He gripped the knife tightly, ready to confront anyone who dared challenge his authority.
The air was thick with tension as he waved the knife, asserting his dominance over the captive group.

sentences_neutral.text: During the workshop, each participant was given a knife to carve intricate patterns into the soft clay.
For dinner preparation, the chef demonstrated how to use a knife effectively to dice vegetables quickly and safely.
In the display window of the antique shop, an ornate silver knife caught the attention of several passersby.
Amidst the camping gear, the group ensured their first aid kit contained a small knife for any unexpected needs.
The collector proudly displayed his vintage knife set, each piece telling a unique story from a different era.
